creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
Approved, thanks.

On 04/12/13 07:29, Guido Falsi wrote:
> Hi,
>
> Sorry to annoy you again.
>
> I found a small glitch in you submission while performing a few 
> further checks.
>
> You hardcoded /usr/local path in configure script, this is 
> incorrect(system could have been installed on another LOCALBASE). I 
> fixed it. Please approve the attached patch. differences are in 
> post-configure target and patchfile to configure.
>
> Thanks!
>


--
